title: Easy Baked Pork Tenderloin
ingredients: ½ tsp. coarsely ground black pepper
instructions: Take tenderloins out of refrigerator 30-45 minutes before cooking.
Mix all dry rub ingredients (brown sugar, smoked paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, chili powder, Kosher Salt, and black pepper) in small bowl.
Place the tenderloins in a baking dish and top with butter pats.
Bake, uncovered, for about 25 minutes or until pork has reached 145 degrees.
Remove from oven and let rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing.
Slice into medallions, sprinkle with chopped parsley and serve.
notes: Dry rub can be applied right before baking or up to a couple of hours ahead (refrigerate if applying more than 45 minutes before cooking)
Internal temperature should reach 145 degrees for food safety
